'''Merson''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]],<ref name="EAOC" /> near the [[Merson asteroid belt]].

==History==
It served as the headquarters for the [[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson pirates]], and was later taken over by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] attempted to [[Battle of Merson|wrest control]] away from the Separatists; however, the CIS forces were five times what was expected, having augmented the native pirates extensively.<ref name="TCSWE" /> The entire Republic ground force was crushed, while the orbiting transports were forced to flee.<ref name="SWR64" />

{{Planet-stub}}
